nodes.name: hadoop-catalog.xml
nodes.summary: Hadoop catalog XML configuration for Presto/Trino to connect to the Iceberg tables stored on MinIO/S3, used for querying the Iceberg sink output in integration tests.

nodes.name: iceberg.properties
nodes.summary: Presto/Trino connector properties file that registers the Iceberg catalog, pointing it to the Hadoop-based catalog configuration for integration test queries.

nodes.name: log.properties
nodes.summary: Minimal Presto/Trino logging configuration file setting the log level for the integration test environment.
